examples.message: 请说明当前 workspace 中有哪些 subagents 和 skills

agent.description: Subagent name, for example security-triage. Omit to use DEFAULT_AGENT.
agent.title: Agent

alert_id.description: Optional SOC alert id used by the feedback loop.
alert_id.title: Alert Id

allowed_tools.description: Per-request allow list. Defaults to DEFAULT_ALLOWED_TOOLS.
allowed_tools.title: Allowed Tools

case_id.description: Optional SOC case id used by the feedback loop.
case_id.title: Case Id

disallowed_tools.description: Per-request deny list. Defaults to DEFAULT_DISALLOWED_TOOLS.
disallowed_tools.title: Disallowed Tools

max_turns.description: Per-request turn cap. Defaults to MAX_TURNS.
max_turns.title: Max Turns

model.description: Per-request model override. Defaults to AGENT_MODEL.
model.title: Model

permission_mode.description: Per-request permission mode override. Defaults to PERMISSION_MODE.
permission_mode.title: Permission Mode

session_id.description: Client-visible session id. If omitted, the API creates one.
session_id.title: Session Id

skills.description: Skill names to enable. Omit to use DEFAULT_SKILLS.
skills.title: Skills

skills_mode.description: Skill loading mode. Omit to use DEFAULT_SKILLS_MODE from docker/.env.
skills_mode.title: Skills Mode

system_append.description: Extra instruction appended to the Claude Code preset prompt.
system_append.title: System Append

max_turns.description: Claude Agent turn cap for this request.
max_turns.title: Max Turns

stream.description: Reserved for compatibility. This shim currently returns non-streaming responses.
stream.title: Stream

info.description: A thin Dockerized API control plane for Claude Agent SDK / Claude Code configurations.
info.title: Claude Agent Runtime API

Restore one Agent managed configuration version

schema.title: Response List Agents Api Agents Get

post.description: Runs one Claude Agent SDK query using defaults from docker/.env and optional per-request overrides.
post.summary: Run a Claude Agent task and return the full result

post.description: Streams session, message, result, error, and done events as text/event-stream.
post.summary: Run a Claude Agent task as server-sent events

get.description: Returns path, mount, scope, load, and git-policy metadata without exposing sensitive file contents.

post.summary: Queue regression impact analysis for one eval run

get.summary: Get one evidence package JSON file

post.summary: Restore workspace files for one pending execution compensation

Execute one batch optimization plan, generate an execution plan, and apply controlled changes
